nasb.text: On its ruin all the birds of the heavens will dwell, and all the beasts of the field will be on its fallen branches

esv.text: On its fallen trunk dwell all the birds of the heavens, and on its branches are all the beasts of the field.

cnv.text: 空中的飛鳥都住在倒下的樹身上，田野的走獸都臥在它的枝條間。

ccb.text: 天上的飞禽要栖身在那折断的树干上，地上的走兽要躺卧在它的枝条中。
